channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Summer vegetation obscuring road signs, 14th June
item.description:
The summer growth of the trees on the stretch of A20 between the flamingo park sports ground and Queen Mary’s Hospital has obscured all the road signs showing the exits to Frognal corner and the hospital. Needs quite a severe cut back of the vegetation to make the signs visible from a distance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Aggressive dog and dog owner, 14th June
item.description:
A white man (probably in his late 30's or early 40's) with a black male labrador in Hawkwood (dog believed to be intact) allowing his off lead dog to go up to other dogs and letting him growl and behave dominant and aggressive. When this man is asked to keep his dog back, he just continues to walk ahead and ignores your request. His dog is unfriendly and the owner is very arrogant and does not care nor respect other walkers or dogs. It is now an ongoing issue and has happened to me and my dog on 5 occasions now. I have spoken with two other dog walkers there who have also encountered this man and his unfriendly dog. When asked again on another day to keep his dog away, he became intimidating and aggressive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Thrift, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned lime e-bike, 14th June
item.description:
Abandoned e-bike with plate number LX1039240100 or LX1039240109 inappropriately parked outside 17 Leydon Close, SE165PF. Please remove. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Leydon Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weed growth, 14th June
item.description:
Excessive weed growth obstructing pavement and access steps

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 'World Foods' Northwold Road / Upper Clapton Road, 14th June
item.description:
Short white male 50yrs shaved head, grey goaty beard, tubby build, t-shirt, grey tracksuit bottoms trainers. random days between 1400-1800, I have seen him buy rice from World Foods he then crosses over the road and empties the rice all over the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Upper Clapton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ridiculous parking, 14th June
item.description:
Parks like this every time, always of an evening or night, has parked across drive ways like this also not allowing space for people to walk past the car. Top end of Grangemill Road leading onto broadmead road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grangemill Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Super deep pothole., 14th June
item.description:
Same pothole that keeps needing to be refilled. However, this looks to be really deep and needs urgent attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morley Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed base and mattress plus lots of rubbish in hedge, 14th June
item.description:
Dumped bed base and mattress. plus lots of rubbish in or leaning up the hedge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 14th June
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the road. Next to the turning on Sandway Road/ oldbury close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164-188, Sandway Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken up pavement, 14th June
item.description:
Pavement had been broken up and sticking out of ground, Vetraland entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich

item.title: Hazelmere and Charteris, 14th June
item.description:
Cat carrer etc dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tipping Again, 14th June
item.description:
Fly tipping Again Including fridge freezer, fencing and general rubbish, has been dumped today 13/06/26 around the recycling bins and bin store of Salisbury Court. Ongoing issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Swinnerton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bench, 14th June
item.description:
Graffiti of white colour on brown painted wood of bench. Found on the junction of Anerley Road with Anerley Park, jut by Asda petrol station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107-111, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerb stone moved AGAIN, 14th June
item.description:
This is a continuous ongoing issue, fundamentally caused by the kerb stones not being installed properly in the first place, then continuing to be bodged rather than fixing the issue. Whoever you are paying to fix this are a joke. It isn’t rocket science…!!!!! Vehicles are obviously driving on the kerb causing this, fix it properly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 148, Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 street lights not working, 14th June
item.description:
These 2 different street lights haven’t been working or months. No one had bothered to come and fix them. Both on the junction of Eden Park Ave/Croydon Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned furniture obstructing shared driveway at 50 Clapton Square courtyard – residents moving items themselves rather than management arranging removal.Abandoned furniture obstructing shared driveway at 50 Clapton Square courtyard – residents moving items themselves rather than management arranging removal., 13th June
item.description:
Furniture has been left beside the bin store in the courtyard at 50 Clapton Square for several weeks. The residents then repeatedly made a mess, obstructing the driveway. The situation is ongoing and has not been resolved via building management.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 13th June
item.description:
There are so many potholes along this stretch
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southill Road, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Pothole and road surface cracking, 13th June
item.description:
Very large pothole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southill Road, Elmstead, Greater London

item.title: Multiple people not picking up dog poo, 13th June
item.description:
Multiple people not attempting to pick up dog poo and are lying about why
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Root branches blocking path, 13th June
item.description:
Shoots about two foot long coming up from root of tree snd blocking pathway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
